title: [SV] VerbatimOp should implment SymbolUserOpInterface
body:
```mlir
$ cat test.mlir
sv.verbatim "// Comment {{0}}" {symbols=[@Foo]}
hw.module private @Foo() {}

$ firtool test.mlir

// Comment Foo  // test.mlir:2:3
module Foo();   // test.mlir:3:3
endmodule
```

```mlir
$ cat test2.mlir
  sv.verbatim "// Comment {{0}}" {symbols=[@Foo]}
$ circt-opt test2.mlir
```

It still passes verifier. VerbatimOp and friends should implement SymbolUserOpInterface.
